name: @berryer/plugin-berryer-server
description: Entrypoint MCP du plugin berryer généraliste (importe @berryer/core).

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from \"module\"; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"

author: DEMERYS INVESTMENT <contact@demerys.com> (https://demerys.com)
